creator: bahlgren@beah.se
text: It is not possible to access svn.freebsd.org from an IPv6-only host.  Only the CNAME record for svn.freebsd.org can be resolved, then it seems stuck.  I don't see any nameserver for geo.freebsd.org with an AAAA record.  Can this be the cause?  Strange enough, "pkg update" etc does work, despite that pkg.freebsd.org, which also uses geo.freebsd.org, also does not resolve.
